sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108236" key="u(podeigmati/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποδειγ-μᾰτίζω</orth>, <sense id="n108236.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">give an example,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:2:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
